allow: PowerShell(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe"; Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:PATH -split ';' | Select-String -Pattern node)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\" -Filter "node.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 3 | Select-Object -First 5 FullName; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE" -Filter "node.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 FullName)
